goal: Use the currently open Roblox Studio scene as the V1 baseline and add deterministic Terrain water around the existing main object without rebuilding or reimporting the scene.
changes: Added a reusable live-scene tool that detects the current main visible object in Workspace.
Preserved the existing open scene objects and did not rerun the whole-cell importer or package assembly.
Cleared Terrain only, then filled a deterministic water volume around the detected main object.
Applied calm readable water settings: blue-green color, moderate transparency, low reflectance, and small waves.
Expanded the V1 water volume vertically with nucleus-aware top clearance and created one authoritative hidden V1_WaterSpawn inside the water.
Disabled other SpawnLocation objects, including the previous MainCellSwimSpawn that could place the character outside water.
Added ServerScriptService.V1WaterSpawnController to force play-mode characters to V1_WaterSpawn after CharacterAdded.
Moved V1_WaterSpawn near Workspace.Nucleus_Model, just outside the nucleus surface, instead of leaving it at the broad water-edge position.
Disabled the previous client-side organic motion script because the vibration/drift read poorly.
Added ServerScriptService.V1BriefOrganicPulseController for brief X/Y/Z movement around each organelle home pivot, with no cumulative drift.
Upgraded the pulse profile to VisibleBriefPulseV3 because earlier amplitudes were too subtle at whole-cell scale.
Upgraded the motion profile to VisibleBriefPulseV4_BoundedDrift with slow bounded organelle drift around the nucleus area.
Added a short edit-mode pulse preview runner and verified motion with a live position delta probe.
Marked Workspace with SceneVersion=V1 and SceneVersionLabel=OpenScene_Water_V1.
Created Workspace.V1_SceneMarker with the main object, bounds, and water metadata.
Created Workspace.V1_SceneWaterVolume as a hidden non-colliding bounds marker so no visible box is added to the scene.

live_studio_result.nucleus_spawn_distance: 273.310 studs from nucleus center horizontally; approximately 95 studs outside the broad nucleus surface
live_studio_result.brief_pulse_style: 18 Hz oscillation around each base pivot using independent X/Y/Z offsets, slow bounded drift, nucleus clamp, and tiny rotations
live_studio_result.bounded_drift: Each organelle uses a slow drift Vector3 around its home pivot plus clampAroundNucleus so it cannot exceed its starting nucleus distance plus slack.
live_studio_result.brief_pulse_probe: VesiclesEndosomes moved 8.2106 studs during live bridge pulse probe, then was restored to the sampled base pivot

tooling_status.computer_use_visual_access: blocked; RobloxStudio get_app_state timed out with Apple event error -10005

validation: Live Studio bridge verification confirmed Workspace V1 attributes and Water material at center and spawn.
Live Studio bridge verification confirmed V1WaterSpawnController exists and only V1_WaterSpawn is enabled.
Live Studio bridge verification confirmed V1OrganicMotionController is disabled.
Live Studio bridge verification confirmed V1OrganicMotionServerController is removed.
Live Studio bridge verification confirmed V1BriefOrganicPulseController exists, has basePivots, and has Vector3 axis profiles.
Live Studio bridge verification confirmed VisibleBriefPulseV3 and measured an 8.2106 stud position delta on VesiclesEndosomes during an active pulse probe.
Live Studio bridge verification confirmed VisibleBriefPulseV4_BoundedDrift includes drift vectors, clampAroundNucleus, V1OrganicMaxNucleusDistance, and V1BoundedDriftClampedModels.
next_recommended_phase: Manually save the currently open Studio place as the V1 place file or publish it as the V1 version after confirming the viewport/play-mode water looks correct.
